productDisplayName: Maxima Men Ssteele Silver Dial Watch
description: Style NoteClassic meets elegance in this leather strap maxima watch which transitions perfectly from day to night. The new range of watches are a fresh take on the Ssteele eye for perfection and are great for urban wear. Product DetailsStainless steel case with a fixed bezel and a leather strapSsteele logo at the 12-hour markTang clasp with an white dial, metallic numbers and handsScrew to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 30 meters -wearable while washing hands and in mild rainComes in an authentic Maxima tin caseWarranty: 1 YearSizeCase diameter: 35 mmCase thickness: 8 mmDial shape: Rectangle
